Caption: (A) Identification of boundary and (B) establishment of mesh in the 3D model.

Simulation of acoustic pressure distribution in Y-Z plane and X-Y plane (where Z = 0.2 mm indicated the surface of glass slide cultivated S. aureus biofilm) at the four input power levels, i.e. (A, a) 60 W, (B, b) 120 W, (C, c) 180 W, and (D, d) 240 W. Units for the colored labels and axes are Pa and mm, respectively.

(A) Survived S. aureus and (B) clearance rate of S. aureus biofilm after 10 min-HIU treatment at 0, 60, 120, 180, and 240 W. Significant differences (p < 0.05) were indicated by different lowercase letters.
FCM analysis of (A) untreated S. aureus and those undergone 10 min-HIU treatment at (B) 60 W, (C) 120 W, (D) 180 W, and (E) 240 W.
CLSM images of (A) untreated S. aureus biofilm and those undergone 10 min-HIU treatment at (B) 60 W, (C) 120 W, (D) 180 W, and (E) 240 W.
SEM images of (A) untreated S. aureus biofilm and those undergone 10 min-HIU treatment at (B) 60 W, (C) 120 W, (D) 180 W, and (E) 240 W.

(A) Changes of relative S. aureus biofilm mass by using continuous HIU treatment for 3 to 18 h at 3 h interval. Transcriptional changes of target genes in untreated S. aureus and those treated by HIU (20 kHz, 60 W, 18 h), including (B) agrA, hla, rbf, sigB, spa, sarA, cidA, lrgA; and (C) aur, clp, icaA, icaD, icaR, nuc1, and seb. Significant differences (p < 0.05) were indicated by “*” symbol.
